name: Hybridity
oneliner: Hybridity automates DORA, NIS2, and GDPR compliance for EU financial institutions using agentic workflows for evidence collection, gap analysis, and regulatory reporting.
finserv: Targets EU financial institutions subject to DORA digital operational resilience requirements. Automates compliance evidence collection and gap assessments through AI agents.
team: Stockholm-based early-stage team. Backed by European investors. Geographic alignment with EU regulatory focus is a strategic advantage.
thesis: Well-positioned for the European market where geography is preferred. Worth monitoring for traction signals over the next 12 months before formal engagement.
evidence: Hybridity raises €2M to automate regulatory compliance through AI
